member.office_address: 354 Russell Senate Office Building Washington DC 20510

form_analysis.form_instructions_text: Please note that submission of this form does not guarantee the request will be accepted by Sen. Budd or included in final legislation. No requests for specific projects/earmarks/"community project funding" will be accepted. If you have technical difficulties or questions, please email Appropriations_Requests@budd.senate.gov.

sections.description: Basic information regarding the nature of the request and the relevant subcommittee.

fields.label: Type of Request
fields.help_text: Select the type of appropriations request being submitted.
fields.rationale: The reference values explicitly state that this is a programmatic funding request for NASA's Science Mission Directorate.

fields.label: Subcommittee
fields.help_text: If you have a request that spans more than one Appropriations subcommittee, you must submit a separate response for each subcommittee.
options: Agriculture, Rural Development, Food and Drug Administration, and Related Agencies
Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies
Labor, Health and Human Services, Education, and Related Agencies
Military Construction, Veterans Affairs, and Related Agencies
State, Foreign Operations, and Related Programs
Transportation, Housing and Urban Development, and Related Agencies
fields.draft_value: Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies
fields.rationale: NASA's Science Mission Directorate falls under the jurisdiction of the Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies Subcommittee of Appropriations.

sections.description: General description and agency details for the proposed request.

fields.label: Agency
fields.help_text: The federal agency associated with the request.
fields.rationale: The request is for NASA's Science Mission Directorate.

fields.label: Request Title
fields.help_text: A brief, descriptive title for the request.
fields.rationale: Standardized project name for the Science account as per instructions.

fields.label: Request Description
fields.help_text: Detailed description of the proposal.
fields.draft_value:
* $9,000,000,000 programmatic funding request for NASA's Science Mission Directorate (SMD)
* Supports mission execution across Earth Science, Planetary Science, Astrophysics, Heliophysics, and Biological and Physical Sciences
* Ensures advancement of National Academies' Decadal Survey priorities to maintain U.S. scientific preeminence
fields.rationale: Directly reflects the $9B funding ask for NASA SMD as specified in the reference values.

fields.label: Proposal Priority
fields.help_text: If your organization is submitting more than one request, indicate the priority ranking.
fields.rationale: The priority ranking is determined by the specific submitter's organizational portfolio and cannot be inferred from the provided context.

sections.description: Detailed fiscal information and historical funding context.

fields.label: Requested Appropriation Amount
fields.help_text: Indicate whether the requested amount is a total funding level, an increase or decrease over a prior year's appropriation, or supports the level in the President's Budget Request. For policy/report language with no fiscal impact, enter N/A.
fields.draft_value:
* Total funding level: $9,000,000,000
* Represents a $1,750,000,000 (24%) increase over the FY2026 enacted level
* Restores agency stability and reverses workforce disruptions following previous budget cuts
fields.rationale: Calculated the increase ($1.75B) based on the $9B ask and the $7.25B FY2026 enacted level provided in the history section.

fields.label: Line Item Title
fields.rationale: Standardized account name for NASA's Science programs.

fields.label: Project Number
fields.rationale: As a programmatic topline request for the Science Mission Directorate rather than a specific building or grant project, a project number is not applicable.

fields.label: President's Budget Request FY2025
fields.help_text: Prior fiscal year funding level requested by the President.
fields.rationale: This is the specific FY2025 President's Budget Request amount from the authoritative SMD Topline Funding History. The pre-filled value was the FY2026 Enacted amount, which is incorrect for this field.

fields.label: President's Budget Request FY2026
fields.help_text: Recent fiscal year funding level requested by the President.
fields.rationale: This is the specific FY2026 President's Budget Request amount from the authoritative SMD Topline Funding History. The pre-filled value was the FY2026 Enacted amount, which is incorrect for this field.

fields.label: Enacted Level FY2025
fields.help_text: Provide the amount appropriated in enacted laws or passed bills. Provide separate amounts for House and Senate if not enacted, and note sources.
fields.rationale: Used the pre-filled value provided in the field annotation, which corresponds to the FY2026 enacted figure from H.R. 6938 in the reference data.

fields.label: Increase
fields.help_text: Check if this request increases spending.
fields.rationale: Generic field type; set to null.

fields.label: No change from FY23 or FY24 enacted amount
fields.help_text: Check if this request maintains current funding levels.
fields.rationale: Generic field type; set to null.

fields.label: Decrease
fields.help_text: Check if this request decreases spending.
fields.rationale: Generic field type; set to null.

fields.label: Policy/report language only or no direct effect on spending
fields.help_text: Check if the request is narrative-only.
fields.rationale: Generic field type; set to null.

fields.label: Justification for Funding Increase
fields.help_text: If requesting an increase, explain (a) why this program must be addressed by the federal government and (b) the compelling need against taxpayer debt burden.
fields.draft_value:
* Strategic competition: Counters China's rapid space expansion and ensures the U.S. continues to lead in setting international norms for exploration
* Economic ROI: Every $1 invested in NASA returns approximately $3 to the economy while sustaining a specialized domestic aerospace workforce
* Essential federal role: Funds high-risk, multi-decadal scientific discovery mandated by Title 51 that private industry cannot replicate
fields.rationale: Synthesized from Advocacy Talking Points and Tone Guide, emphasizing economic impact and the space race with China.

fields.label: Designated Offset
fields.help_text: Include program name and offset amount. Increases will not be considered without a proposed offset.
fields.rationale: The determination of specific offsets involves complex budgetary trade-offs that are at the discretion of the submitter or the subcommittee; providing a guess could be counterproductive to the strategy.

sections.description: Additional context regarding legal language, local impact, and existing support.

fields.label: Proposed Bill or Report Language
fields.help_text: Provide the specific text for the bill or report language requested.
fields.rationale: Standard programmatic funding line for the NASA Science account in CJS appropriations.

fields.label: What impacts does this program have on North Carolina?
fields.help_text: Detail the benefits or effects of this program within the state.
fields.draft_value:
* $25,707,989.86 in total NASA Science obligations in North Carolina (FY2023-FY2025)
* Supports Duke University ($8.7M) in Durham for Roman Telescope infrastructure and satellite systems for malaria elimination
* Funds Metacept, Inc. ($1.5M) in Durham to develop advanced metasurface radar for precise cloud and weather measurement
* Drives critical research and STEM workforce training at UNC-Chapel Hill ($5.7M) and Southwestern Community College ($3.1M)
fields.rationale: Incorporated specific recipient names, dollar amounts, and project descriptions from the NASA Spending Context for North Carolina.

fields.label: Congressional Support - Briefings
fields.help_text: List Members, Committees, and staff names to whom this proposal has been or will be presented.
fields.rationale: Requires specific internal tracking of staff interactions and meeting dates not present in the provided context.

fields.label: Congressional Support - Confirmed Submissions
fields.help_text: List Members leading support letters or confirmed submissions to the Appropriations Committee. Include staff names.
fields.rationale: No confirmed Senate support letter lead or specific staff names are provided in the reference data.

sections.description: Details about the organization submitting the request.
Contact information for the primary individual associated with this request.

fields.label: Upload File
fields.help_text: Please attach any additional explanatory materials related to your request here.
fields.rationale: File must be attached manually.
